headline: American Express Canada Expands Platinum Dining Experiences with New American Express ® Chef in Residence Program
summary: American Express Canada today announced the launch of American Express ® Chef in Residence, the next evolution of its Platinum Dining Experiences program. Through Chef in Residence, American Express is redefining what a culinary partnership that unlocks unique experiences for Cardmembers and provides creative opportunities for partner chefs.

headline: Toast Expands With Alinea Partnership And AI Suite As Valuation Lags
summary: Toast (NYSE:TOST) announced a new partnership with The Alinea Group, which is adopting Toast as its preferred technology platform across its Michelin starred and high end restaurants. The company also introduced an expanded set of AI powered products, including Toast IQ Grow for marketing automation, AI multi location analytics, AI invoice scanning, and an AI integrated drive thru system. Additional updates include new capabilities for Toast Local through a partnership with Resy and American...
